scripts.opti-push: pnpm exec optimizely-cms-cli config push optimizely.config.mjs
scripts.opti-generate: pnpm exec optimizely-cms-cli manifest generate > manifest.json
scripts.opti-generate-upload: pnpm exec optimizely-cms-cli manifest generate | pnpm exec optimizely-cms-cli manifest push
scripts.opti-upload: cat manifest.json | pnpm exec optimizely-cms-cli manifest push
scripts.opti-upload-force: pnpm exec optimizely-cms-cli manifest generate | pnpm exec optimizely-cms-cli manifest push --force
